title: athyrium zanzibaricum
intro: Athyrium zanzibaricum, also known as the Zanzibar Lady Fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of Africa and the Comoros Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Athyrium zanzibaricum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for medicinal purposes.
